examples.text: هَلْ تُعَبِّرُ عَنْ عَدَمِ الرِّضَا عَنْ إِيمَانِنَا؟
examples.english: Are you expressing dissatisfaction with our faith?

senses.gloss: contentedness, satisfaction, fulfillment, being well pleased

examples.text: لَا تُقْمِرَنَّ عَلَى قَمْرٍ وَلَيْلَتِهِ، / لَا عَنْ رِضَاكَ، وَلَا بِالكُرْهِ، مُغْتَصِبَا

senses.gloss: ʿAlī al-Riḍā, the 8th Shia Imam and an important Muslim figure in the Abbasid era.
